pi_items.source: Explicitly required in the task description and verifier.py checks for this name in the SEB Server database.
Explicitly required in the task description and verifier.py searches for this URL in the SEB Server database dump.
Explicitly required in the task description ('Disable/Uncheck') and verifier.py uses a VLM check for 'Confirm Quit' disabled status.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions explicitly require creating a Safe Exam Browser configuration named 'Biology Final - Moodle AutoQuit' with a specific Moodle Quit URL ('https://lms.university.edu/mod/quiz/review.php') and disabling the 'Confirm Quit' setting. These expected values are synthetically generated for the task and are directly validated by the verifier scripts.
